headline: A Look At Verizon (VZ) Valuation After Strong Q1 Earnings And Subscriber Turnaround
summary: Verizon Communications (VZ) is back in focus after a Q1 update that paired higher adjusted earnings guidance with rare first quarter postpaid phone subscriber gains, a shift that is drawing fresh investor attention. See our latest analysis for Verizon Communications. At a share price of US$46.61, Verizon’s recent Q1 surprise and subscriber momentum sit alongside a 17.08% 90 day share price return. The 12.91% one year total shareholder return points to rebuilding confidence after past...
